decisions.name: security
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): src code changes with LLM call context threading (attribution fields forwarding)

decisions.name: performance
decisions.reason: I/O 반복·대용량 처리·정렬·캐시 변경 없음 — 내부 매개변수 전달만

decisions.name: architecture
decisions.reason: 모듈 경계·레이어 변경 없음 — service 간 컨텍스트 전달 내부 기능

decisions.name: requirement
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): spec 7-llm-usage §1.3 attribution 갭 해소 구현

decisions.name: side_effect
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): 함수 시그니처 변경(llmContext 추가), LLM 호출 경로 context 전파

decisions.name: maintainability
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): JSDoc 추가, interface 확장, 필드 오탈자 방지 type annotation

decisions.name: testing
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): src 변경 + llmContext attribution flow 신규 test coverage

decisions.name: documentation
decisions.reason: agents_forced (router_safety): CHANGELOG.md 변경 + 소스 JSDoc spec reference 추가

decisions.name: database
decisions.reason: DB migration/schema/ORM 변경 없음 — in-memory thread 상태 mutation만

decisions.name: concurrency
decisions.reason: async/await·Promise·lock·queue·setTimeout 변경 없음 — 동기 매개변수 전달

decisions.name: api_contract
decisions.reason: HTTP route·GraphQL·OpenAPI 변경 없음 — 내부 service 경계 기능

decisions.name: user_guide_sync
decisions.reason: PROJECT.md 갱신 trigger 범위 외(내부 구현) — user-facing 기능 무
